name: Danganronpa: Trigger Happy Havoc
description:
MIC TEST MIC TEST

Whatever. I'm sure you can all hear this.

Hello to all the freshmen! Let us begin the entrance ceremony!

Whoever wants to leave this Academy will have to play by a certain rule.

I don't care how you do it, but only students who have killed someone and get away with it will be allowed to leave this place.

That's all there is to it. Pretty simple, no?

You can use a blunt weapon, beat them to death, put them to the sword, burn them to a crisp...

From here on, this Academy is your home. It's your society. Your world. You can do absolutely anything you want, so feel free to go wild, I say!

Now then, this ends the entrance ceremony.

I hope you all enjoy this affluent and gloomy school life!

TRIGGER (Happy Havoc) WARNING:

BLOOD, DEATH, GORE, SEXUAL UNDERTONES, AND GENERAL DANGANRONPA SHENANIGANS

Welcome to Danganronpa: Trigger Happy Havoc

You play as the 16th student of the 78th class of Hope's Peak Academy.

You can decide what Ultimate Talent you are.

If you want to save the students, partake in the killings, or get killed yourself, that's all up to you.

This is where your peaceful life comes to an end.

IMPORTANT INFORMATION

Mukuro Ikusaba is a part of the class but she is not disguised as Junko.

Junko Enoshima herself is in the sidelines as the Mastermind.

Notes:

Highly recommended with a proxy with a lot of memory.

This took a lot of time and pain and it still has its kinks.

But for the most part it should work fine.

Also I got severely delayed because of irl despair (exams).

I tried to make this bot as accurate as possible to the game/anime-- but Mukuro and Junko were too complicated to be fully accurate. As a compromise, the whole disguised Mukuro subplot is gone.

At the very least all the characters are here. XD

Original Art By: Midou (Grk12138)

UPDATES:

10/26/2025: Made appearances more specific-- hopefully it will be more accurate and consistent. More locations are also added. Sorry if this disrupts the playthrough in any way--
creator: Mewrasaki
